steps.title: Identify the goal and the key insight
steps.content:
Goal: emphasize SIMILARITY between the two materials.

The notes show both materials undergo torsional heating when twisted, even though the temperature increases differ (3.5°C vs 21.3°C).

An effective choice will treat them as sharing the same behavior, not contrast their differences.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content:
B uses “Both” and presents a single shared behavior: both heat up when twisted.

The others fail the goal:
  • A mentions both without establishing similarity
  • C explicitly contrasts their temperature changes
  • D generalizes about torsional heating without focusing on the two materials
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
